content.en:
If the Double Supreme wants to be promoted to the Triple Supreme One, it is more difficult than the First Supreme to the Double Supreme One, but the difficulty is only greater.

But last time, in order to impact the Triple Supreme One, Ye Tian used up all the Eternal Ancient Pine Leaves and other auxiliary materials, so if he continued to impact the Triple Supreme Realm now, the success rate was not too high.

So, Ye Tian entered the Source God Pavilion again.

However, there are too few resources that can help the Dual Supreme break through the Triple Superior, and even in the Source God Pavilion, it is difficult to trade such resources, unless you happen to have resources that other Supreme Beings have, you can trade the resources you need.

"Hey, there is actually a mission issued by the Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This mission is about the Battle of the Wind Ancient River, one of the industries that belongs to one of the Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion, the Wind Ancient River can also be said to be a treasure land, capable of giving birth to Wind Source Crystal Sand.

The Wind Source Crystal Sand is one of the materials for refining the Source Vessel, which is of great value in the Source Sea, and the entire Wind Ancient River can imagine how many Wind Source Crystal Sand can be born.

However, not long ago, the Eternal Tribulation Clan set their sights on the Wind Ancient River, and used special means to pull the Wind Ancient River into the depths of the void, preparing to transform the Wind Ancient River into the Eternal Tribulation Domain, and it was a high-level Eternal Tribulation Domain.

This time, the Eternal Tribulation Clan dispatched a large number of clansmen, and even the half-step Eternal Realm dispatched six to join forces to lay out.

Because it was a sudden action and instantly wiped out the guards of the Wind Ancient River, the news did not spread, and by the time the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor knew, the Wind Ancient River had already been half transformed.

Now, the Wind Ancient River has not yet been transformed, and it is only equivalent to the Intermediate Eternal Tribulation Domain, and at most the Sixfold Supreme is allowed to enter it.

At present, the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor is preparing to recapture the Wind Ancient River.

For this reason, the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor sent a large number of Supreme Beings into the Wind Ancient River to fight with the Eternal Tribulation Clan, if a large number of Eternal Tribulation Clans were killed, or even the Eternal Tribulation Clan was wiped out in the Wind Ancient River, then the Eternal Tribulation Clan would not be able to transform the Wind Ancient River, so that there was hope that it would be recaptured by the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor.

Many Eternal Tribulation Clans were transformed from treasure land, but Ye Tian knew this.

He just didn't expect the Eternal Tribulation Ancestor to be so bold and dare to attack the Feng Gu Origin Ancestor, one of the twelve ancestors of the Source God Pavilion, is it really worth it to offend such a great power?

If the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor did whatever it takes, it would definitely bring huge losses to the Eternal Tribulation Clan.

Ye Tian didn't think about the reason, this time was also a good thing for him.

At the very least, in order to gather more supreme beings, the Wind Ancient Source Ancestor released this task in the Source God Pavilion, and the task reward was very rich.

Among these lists, there are a variety of resources that can help the Supreme One break through the realm, and some of them have no sequelae, and even the top resources that can help the Sixfold Supreme break through the Sevenfold Superior.

Of course, if you want to get better treasures, you have to kill more Eternal Tribulations.

If Ye Tian killed a Sixfold Supreme Peer-level Eternal Tribulation Clan, it would be enough to supply him with the resources to break through to the Triple Supreme Realm.

It's a pity that it is difficult for Xingzu to obtain too many resources, after all, Xingzu is sealed, and he is also consuming resources, plus he was sealed too early, and the resources accumulated on his body are not too much, otherwise Ye Tian can gather resources if he squeezes them a few more times, and he will not need to obtain resources from Fenggu Yuanzu.

"This task is taken!"

Ye Tian decided.

Although his cultivation was only in the realm of the Twofold Supreme, even if he did not rely on the fingers of the Eternal Tribulation Power, it was enough to exert a strength comparable to that of the ordinary Fivefold Supreme, and if he exerted the power of the Eternal Realm Fingers, a single blow would be enough to severely damage or even kill the weaker Eightfold Supreme.

But compared to the Ninefold Being, he was far from being able to do it, after all, he couldn't hurt the Ninefold Peer with a single blow at most.

But the Wind Ancient River only allows the Sixfold Supreme to enter, what is he afraid of?

After taking this task, Ye Tian sent his copy body to carry a finger from the Eternal Realm to the Wind Ancient River.

......

Kazekogawa.

Ye Tian came here, and after immediately reporting his identity, he entered Fenggu Hanoi.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled through a void crack and came to an endless river.

This is the Kazekogawa.

The Fenggu River is composed of islands and river water, and the wind source crystal sand exists at the bottom of the Fenggu River.

However, there were not enough manpower and time, and there was not much wind source crystal sand collected, so Ye Tian was not interested in collecting wind source crystal sand.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled through the Wind Ancient River, without hiding his aura at all, if he attracted the Eternal Tribulation Clan to attack him, it would be a good thing.

If the other party underestimates him and only thinks that he is an ordinary double supreme, then he will give him a head.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's copying talent sensed the existence of the talent, and an Eternal Tribulation appeared in his perception.

The other party hid his body aura and was approaching him.

Rumble!

The other party suddenly attacked, and it was an Eternal Tribulation Clan comparable to the realm of the Fivefold Supreme One.

The other party was very excited, thinking that he would definitely be able to kill Ye Tian with one blow.

However, after Ye Tian added many defensive supreme skills to himself, he immediately cast the Destruction Finger Interception.

Of course, Ye Tian did not use all his strength to urge the Destruction Finger, but only exerted a part of his strength, and unleashed a blow comparable to that of the Sevenfold Supreme.

That Eternal Tribulation Clan of the Fivefold Supreme Realm didn't expect Ye Tian's strength to be so terrifying, only the Twofold Supreme Realm, and actually exerted a blow from the Sevenfold Supreme Realm, which was unreasonable!

However, he didn't have time to think about it.

Poof!

A huge hole had been pierced in his body, and all his life was annihilated, turning into a corpse.

Ye Tian forcibly suppressed the discomfort in his body, immediately put away the corpse of this Eternal Tribulation, and then quickly left here.

After a long time.

Ye Tian found an island, hidden in a grain of gravel, and tried his best to hide his breath, and then he breathed a sigh of relief.

He then began to heal the injuries caused by the fingers of the Eternal Realm.

It took a long time for the injury to recover.

"Keep moving!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

He left from here, continuing to lure the Eternal Tribulation into attacking him in this way, and then killing them back.

Of course, Ye Tian was also very cautious, and once he sensed more than two Eternal Tribulation Clans, he would leave immediately.

In this way, tens of thousands of years passed.

And Ye Tian killed a total of thirteen Eternal Tribulation Clans, including six Eternal Tribulation Clans in the Fourfold Supreme One Realm, five Eternal Tribulation Clans in the Fivefold Supreme One Realm, and two Eternal Tribulation Clans in the Sixfold Supreme One Realm.

In order to kill the Sixfold Supreme, Ye Tian had urged the Eternal Realm fingers twice in a row, and the injury was not light.
